svg.text: Data Governance Platform — Information Flow Diagram
Data objects and payloads flowing between components
Orchestration strategies: FAST · BALANCED · THOROUGH · ADAPTIVE

Data Governance Platform — Policy-as-Code PoC. Federated governance using UN Peacekeeping model (shared policies, distributed enforcement). LLM semantic validation requires Ollama running on localhost:11434 with ENABLE_LLM_VALIDATION=true.
